series_metadata.series_description: This form, INV0099, along with INV 0100, 0100A and 0100B are created by Ohio Investigative Unit personnel in order to conduct or notify the Executive Director or Senior Enforcement Commander of the results of or to request a long-term criminal or civil investigationDirector of the Department of Public Safety of the results of or to request a long term criminal or civil investigation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Document will be scanned into database. Retain electronic record permanently. ; Paper: Document will be scanned into database. Retained in District Office until case is over and all appeals are final, then destroy. Retain in Central Office for 6 years, then destroy., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
